description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior features a combination of light brown and white walls, with multiple symmetrically arranged windows on each side. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch supported by columns, and decorative railings. The rear of the house has a balcony or terrace area, partially enclosed with railings, and large windows that provide ample natural light. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from masonry or concrete, with glass windows and metal or wooden railings. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on symmetry and practical urban living.
description: A two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, light brown and white exterior, symmetrical windows, and a covered front porch with columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and decorative railings, as well as the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade with multiple windows in symmetrical rows and a visible balcony or terrace at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with large windows and the balcony or terrace area, as well as the flat roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the side access to the terrace or balcony, with the flat roof visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, covered porch, columns, and decorative railings
